title: Frontier Code (GPT-5.6 VS Mythos): This BENCHMARK is ACTUALLY REAL!
summary: Cognition released FrontierCode, a benchmark that measures whether AI-generated code is mergeable and production-ready based on code review standards, rather than just test passage. The benchmark uses blocker criteria, weighted scores, and maintainer-defined rubrics from 36 open-source repositories and reports lower false positive rates than SWE-Bench Pro.
